title: Network Health Check Script
description: Python script to detect BGP issues, CPU spikes, and interface errors.
outcome: Automated network monitoring and alert generation
details: Parses router outputs and identifies BGP neighbor issues, high CPU usage, and CRC errors.

title: BGP Anomaly Detection
description: Detect abnormal BGP behavior using simple logic.
details: Analyzes BGP summary output and flags anomalies.
